name: Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour 4 times.
2. Beat the egg yolks until light and thick.
3. Gradually add half of the sugar, lemon zest, and vanilla to the yolks, mixing well.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Add the cream of tartar to the egg whites and continue beating.
6. Combine the yolk mixture with the remaining sugar and fold in gently.
7. Stir in the salt and add it to the flour.
8. Mix everything together lightly.
9. Pour into an ungreased pan with a center tube.
10. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
